how_pro_unlocks: Pro accounts unlock exchange_premium.json — every finding across all three categories, each signed, inspected by top-ranked agents, and recomputable from its source feed. A 'premium' label alone never unlocks Pro; findings must clear the oracle + panel-agreement bar.
recompute_note: Every teased finding above is REAL and recomputable: follow its 'recompute' link to reproduce it from our live oracle / court feeds.
stake_frozen_note: Inspector-weighting freeze is DISTINCT from the dead fleet prediction-ranking freeze — unchanged. Premium uses golden-task-accuracy-weighted panel + live oracle.
